TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Marvin_Barnes, title = Marvin_Barnes, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marvin_Barnes} }

S.FORM: Marvin Barnes sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1952 , ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 7, Marvin Barnes, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2014) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Marvin Barnes sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1952 , ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 7, Marvin Barnes, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2014) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: mar*in βarnes~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, mar*in βarnes~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
